news.title: Chevron (CVX) Signs 20 Year Microsoft Deal To Power Texas AI Data Center
news.summary: Chevron (NYSE:CVX) has entered a 20 year agreement to supply natural gas power to a major Microsoft AI data center in West Texas. The project, known as Project Kilby, involves Chevron, Microsoft and energy infrastructure firm Joulent. The deal uses Chevron's resource position in the Permian Basin to provide electricity tailored to AI data center power needs. For readers tracking Chevron, this move extends the company beyond its traditional upstream and downstream oil and gas focus into...

news.title: This Bill Gates-Backed Energy Stock Is Rising After Big Earnings Miss
news.summary: Fervo early Monday announced an agreement with Nvidia and Pacific Northwest Laboratory to develop a next-generation digital platform for geothermal drilling operations, according to a media release.  The Houston-based geothermal energy, which is backed by Bill Gates, will be working with the Pacific Northwest Laboratory and Nvidia to train artificial-intelligence models, which will then be integrated into the Nvidia Omniverse libraries, to help geothermal operations more efficiently drill deep into the earth to harness steam to generate electricity.

news.title: Oil falls on US-Iran progress; pound holds up as Starmer resigns
news.summary: Oil prices fell Monday on optimism over talks by the US and Iran after mediators flagged a "roadmap" to a final agreement, while major stock markets traded mixed.Oil prices fell as maritime traffic in the Strait of Hormuz on Monday continued to flow at a faster pace than before the agreement between Iran and the United States on talks to end their war, according to tracking firms, despite Tehran's announcement of a renewed closure.
